title: Pineapple Baby and the Kindness Lantern Quest
shortDescription:
A Fruit Baby Island Adventure

When Tiki Trouble takes things that are not his and turns careless jokes into hurt feelings, the Kindness Lantern Festival begins to lose its glow. Pineapple Baby, Dragon Fruit Baby, Strawberry Baby, and Ube Baby must use their special gifts to comfort worried hearts, repair what was broken, and help Tiki learn that real friendship begins with honesty, kindness, and making things right.
